blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for curr (current snapshot), prev (previous snapshot), audit (trail output), and staging libraries, %LET audit control parameters (audit_date, audit_user, log_level), and OPTIONS

Parameterized %MACRO audit_table(table_name=, pk_col=) — detects INSERTs, DELETEs, and UPDATEs via three PROC SQL LEFT/INNER JOINs comparing curr vs prev snapshots using MD5 checksum for change detection, combines changes into staging.changes_&table_name via DATA step, and uses %IF/%ELSE for conditional detail vs summary logging
Table monitoring configuration via %LET: n_tables=5 and per-table name/primary-key mappings for customer_master, product_catalog, order_header, supplier_info, and employee_roster
Driver loop macro %macro run_audit_batch wrapping %DO t=1 %TO &n_tables — iterates over all 5 monitored tables and invokes %audit_table with resolved table name and primary key parameters
Invocation of %run_audit_batch to execute change detection across all 5 monitored tables
Open-code %IF/%ELSE conditional block: checks &syserr for audit batch errors and warns that some tables may not have been audited
DATA step merging staging.changes_customer_master through staging.changes_employee_roster into audit.master_audit_trail with global sequence numbering
PROC FREQ generating change type distribution by table_source and overall change_type frequency from audit.master_audit_trail
PROC SQL reporting change volume by table and change type from audit.master_audit_trail, ordered by change count descending
Title reset, LIBNAME CLEAR for curr, prev, and staging libraries, and audit trail completion log message
